zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Lawrence Fitton於1375年出生在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯時，他的父親Thomas Fitton II53歲，母親Margaret Leigh45歲。他於1395年與Lady Agnes Hesketh在英國結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年2月14日在他的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Lawrence Fitton于1375年出生在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯时，他的父亲Thomas Fitton II53岁，母亲Margaret Leigh45岁。他于1395年与Lady Agnes Hesketh在英国结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年2月14日在他的家乡享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Lawrence Fitton was born in 1375, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Fitton II, was 53 and his mother, Margaret Leigh, was 45. He married Lady Agnes Hesketh in 1395, in England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 14 February 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Lawrence Fitton est né en 1375, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Fitton II, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margaret Leigh, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Hesketh en 1395, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Lawrence Fitton 1375 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fitton II 53 und seine Mutter Margaret Leigh 45. Er hat 1395 in England Lady Agnes Hesketh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1456 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lawrence Fitton è nato il nel 1375 nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Fitton II, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Leigh, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Hesketh nel 1395, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Lawrence Fittonが1375年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Fitton IIは53歳，母Margaret Leighは45歳であった。1395年にイギリスでLady Agnes Heskethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年2月14日に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Lawrence Fitton(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fitton II(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Leigh(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1395년 영국에서 Lady Agnes Hesketh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 2월 14일 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lawrence Fitton nasceu em 1375, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Fitton II, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Leigh, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Hesketh em 1395, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Lawrence Fitton родился в 1375 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Fitton II было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Leigh, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Hesketh в 1395 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 14 февраля 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Lawrence Fitton nació en 1375, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Fitton II, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Margaret Leigh, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Hesketh en 1395, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
